input.content:
# Q3 pricing decision — $19 tier hold through August

**Derived from**: operation/memory/q3-pricing-note.md (planning call, 2026-06-28)

## Decision

Hold the Pro tier at **$19/mo through August 2026**. Move to $24/mo starting September.

Annual plan: $230/yr (two months free), launch in Q4 alongside the price move.

Signup grant: $3, unchanged.

## Rationale

Gross margin on the $19 Pro tier is thin post-model-cost-increase. The August hold allows us to:
- stabilize product/market fit into summer  
- watch churn against the $24 move before go-live
- communicate the change early to annual-plan buyers (aligns Sep launch with the price move)

The annual plan at $230/yr ($19.17/mo effective) addresses the 90-day churn cliff with a 15-month retention anchor.

## Recorded

2026-07-02 01:31 UTC by operator.
input.message: Derive pricing decision: hold $19 tier until August, move to $24 in September per operator refinement
